loading.title: Cancelling Your Registration...
loading.message: Please wait while we process your cancellation.

success.title: Registration Cancelled
success.subtitle: Your registration has been successfully cancelled
success.permanentDeletionText: Your registration has been permanently removed from our system.
success.noFurtherActionText: You will not receive any further communications about this event.
success.registerAgainText: If you change your mind, you can register again at any time before the event.

error.title: Cancellation Failed
error.subtitle: Unable to cancel your registration
error.checkLink: Check if you clicked the correct link from your email
error.alreadyCancelled: Registration may have already been cancelled
error.useLatestEmail: Make sure you're using the latest email
error.contactSupport: Contact support if the problem persists

errors.expired: Cancellation link has expired (valid for 48 hours).
errors.invalid: Invalid cancellation link. Please check your email for the correct link.
errors.notFound: Registration not found or already cancelled.
errors.default: Failed to cancel registration. Please try again or contact support.

notFound.title: Registration not found
notFound.message: Please check your confirmation code and try again.

successPage.pendingMessage: If you submitted a registration, please check your email for the confirmation link.
successPage.pendingLinkValidity: The confirmation link is valid for 48 hours.
successPage.title: Registration Submitted!

successPage.createAccountTitle: Create an Account to Manage Your Registrations
successPage.createAccountText: After confirming your registration via email, you can create an account to view and manage all your event registrations in one place.

errors.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields correctly.
errors.acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions to register.

wizard.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel registration?
wizard.waitlistWarning: This event is full. Submitting will add you to the waitlist.
wizard.waitlistAcknowledgeLabel: I understand I will be on the waitlist
wizard.waitlistSuccessBody: You are #{{position}} on the waitlist. We'll email you if a spot opens.

personalDetails.title: Personal Information
personalDetails.subtitle: Please provide your details to register for the event.

fields.emailHelper: We'll send your ticket and event updates here

confirmStep.title: Review & Confirm
confirmStep.subtitle: Please review your information and complete your registration.

commPref.title: Communication Preferences
commPref.reminders: Send me event reminders (1 week and 1 day before)

specialRequests.label: Special Requests
specialRequests.helper: Let us know if you have any dietary requirements or accessibility needs.

terms.error: You must accept the terms and conditions to complete registration.

account.title: Want to manage all your registrations in one place?
account.message: After registering, you can create a free account to view your registration history, update preferences, and get personalized event recommendations.

success.title: Registration Submitted!
success.subtitle: Check your email to confirm your registration
success.emailSentTo: We've sent a confirmation email to

success.checkEmail: Verify the email address is correct

companySearch.createNew: You can continue with "{{value}}" as a new company
companySearch.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search

loading.title: Confirming Your Registration...
loading.message: Please wait while we process your confirmation.

success.title: Registration Confirmed!
success.subtitle: You're all set for the event
success.checkInText: Present your ID at the event desk for check-in. We'll have your confirmed registration on file.
success.eventDetailsText: You'll receive event updates and reminders via email.

alreadyConfirmed.title: Already Confirmed
alreadyConfirmed.subtitle: This registration has already been confirmed

error.title: Confirmation Failed

registrationStatusBanner.confirmed: Your registration is confirmed. We'll see you there!
registrationStatusBanner.registered: You are registered for this event. Check your email for confirmation.
registrationStatusBanner.waitlist: You are on the waitlist. We'll notify you if a spot opens.

registrationStatusGuard.alreadyRegistered: You are already registered for this event

page.title: Cancel Registration
page.confirmQuestion: Hi {{name}}, are you sure you want to cancel your registration for {{eventTitle}} on {{eventDate}}?

modal.title: Cancel Registration
modal.body: Enter your email address and we'll send you a cancellation link.
